languages.text: "Напоминаю о твоей тайне, Изимонд. И о том, что она интересна многим".
"Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?
languages.original_text: "Напоминаю о твоей тайне, Изимонд. И о том, что она интересна многим".

traits.locale_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?
"Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?
"Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

languages.text: «¿Debo recordarle su secreto, Sauerback? ¿Y cuánta gente estaría interesada en conocerlo?».
languages.original_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

traits.locale_text: «¿Debo recordarle su secreto, Sauerback? ¿Y cuánta gente estaría interesada en conocerlo?».

languages.text: “非要我拿你的秘密来提醒你吗，苏尔贝克？你说会有哪些人对它感兴趣呢？”
languages.original_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

traits.locale_text: “非要我拿你的秘密来提醒你吗，苏尔贝克？你说会有哪些人对它感兴趣呢？”

languages.text: « Dois-je vous rappeler votre petit secret, Sauerback ? Et les nombreuses personnes qui seraient curieuses de le découvrir ? »
languages.original_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

traits.locale_text: « Dois-je vous rappeler votre petit secret, Sauerback ? Et les nombreuses personnes qui seraient curieuses de le découvrir ? »

languages.text: "Sana sırrını hatırlatmalı mıyım Sauerback? Bir de bunu öğrenmek isteyebilecek onlarca insan olduğunu?"
languages.original_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

traits.locale_text: "Sana sırrını hatırlatmalı mıyım Sauerback? Bir de bunu öğrenmek isteyebilecek onlarca insan olduğunu?"

languages.text: "Muss ich Euch an Euer Geheimnis erinnern, Sauerback? Und an die vielen Leute, die es gerne erfahren würden?"
languages.original_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

traits.locale_text: "Muss ich Euch an Euer Geheimnis erinnern, Sauerback? Und an die vielen Leute, die es gerne erfahren würden?"

languages.text: 「サウアーバック、あなたの秘密を思い出させておく必要があるのですか？そして、それを知りたいと思っている多くの人々を？
languages.original_text: "Must I remind you of your secret, Sauerback? And of the many people who would be interested to learn of it?

traits.locale_text: 「サウアーバック、あなたの秘密を思い出させておく必要があるのですか？そして、それを知りたいと思っている多くの人々を？
